hero.subtitle: WareBi was born from Moussa Marega's vision: bring together a multidisciplinary team to support businesses and institutions through digital transformation, with expertise forged at leading companies.

story.title: Our story &
story.p1: It all started with a strong conviction: Senegal needs local players capable of driving its digital transformation. Moussa Marega brought together a team with complementary expertise — business analysis, development, data, AI, finance and communication.
story.p2: Our team draws on solid experience gained within demanding organizations: Groupe Brenacaire, Arkea, Crédit Mutuel Sud Ouest and an IT company in Canada. This diversity gives us both a local and international perspective.
story.p3: Today, WareBi supports businesses and institutions in their transformation: data analytics, custom development, process automation and AI integration.

process.title: How we
process.subtitle: A proven methodology for measurable results at every step.

understand.title: Understand
understand.description: We analyze your context, data and objectives to fully understand your needs.

build.title: Build
build.description: We develop the right technical solution, using an agile approach with regular iterations.

measure.title: Measure
measure.description: We track KPIs and continually optimize to maximize the impact of our solutions.

support.title: Support
support.description: We stay by your side to evolve the solution and address your new challenges.

team.title: The
team.subtitle: Passionate experts, united around a common mission: digitalize Senegal.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Always looking for the best technologies to offer cutting-edge solutions.

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.description: Every project is led by confirmed specialists with years of field experience.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We don't deliver a product, we build a lasting relationship based on trust.

rigor.title: Rigor
rigor.description: Data-driven approach, clean code, documented deliverables and proven processes.
